title: Create: High Pressure
description: A small Create addon allowing the player to build their own self-sustainable diamond factory.
body:
# The premise
This extremely lightweight addon mod aims to give you a seamless and bloatless way of producing diamonds reliably, with no mining needed. It is quite costly though!

It is meant to be survival friendly and not OP in any way.



**THIS ADDON REQUIRES THE CREATE MOD TO WORK**



Support the author: [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/aweeri)

Contact the author: [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/3gNYpzjagc)



# New items

## Graphite Powder
Made from blasting coal or charcoal, used for the production of graphite.
 
![Graphite Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99bc033a6f492478d1150e4038548e8478c39717.png)

## Graphite
Made from graphite powder through the process of compacting in a heated basin.
When compacted in a superheated basin, it has a **really** low chance of turning into a diamond.

![Graphite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14efdeb790f585fb2d2ea31de39254cd202fc018.png)

## Impure Diamond
Compacting superheated graphite will sometimes result in an impure product. You can throw it away, or recycle some of it back into graphite powder to make your factory more efficient!

![Impure Diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16b3ae4c72f66a9b056aeec038b8e35f387de9e1.png)




# New Recipes

## Netherrack cycling
Self-sustainable blaze cake automation is now possible thanks to netherrack cycling, where gravel and lava are used to multiply your netherrack.

![Netherrack Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f283417da0776eded55e815c1ebd11f0392a66a2.png)

## High temperature compacting
This is the main process behind your self-sustainable diamond production, where graphite becomes diamond at an extremely low rate.

![High Temp Compacting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acec1001ec456a3852619d027e69360fadea224f.png)

## Graphite powder compacting
Not much to say here, this turns your graphite powder into solid graphite.

![Compacting Graphite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/038383d291e6d504fb959e62f19b15c29a0616f5.png)

## Impure diamond recycling
This process lets you reuse some of your impure diamonds for powdered graphite and experience.

![Recycling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b103a8cb073acbe4c506ed04df8144da75465c00.png)

## Coal blasting
This process converts your coal (or charcoal!) into powdered graphite.

![Blasting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23a0d68ce7ce31a50a9cc4ebe904438b6d2cacbc.png)
